title: eragrostis collina
intro: Eragrostis collina, also known as hairy love grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Eragrostis collina include treating various health issues such as fever, cough, and digestive problems, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Eragrostis collina can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
